mapper.select: SELECT si.*, m.material_name, m.material_type FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id WHERE si.supplier_id = #{supplierId}

SELECT si.id, si.supplier_id, si.material_id, si.unit_price, si.unit, si.supply_available, si.note, si.created_at, si.updated_at, m.material_name AS material_name, m.material_type AS material_type, m.warehouse_code AS warehouse_code FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id WHERE si.supplier_id = #{supplierId}
